calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-11-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The case is dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). The court finds no good cause or substantial justification for failure to comply with the previous court orders. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-04-2019 Continued To Apr-09-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Court does not impose sanctions against plaintiff's counsel. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to Apr-09-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

**Per Judge Wong, clerk to send order also to: Dax Craven 18 Bartol Street, #1067, San Francisco, CA 94133**

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-01-2018 Continued To Jan-29-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
Dax Craven, Esq. present in court. All outstanding sanctions have been paid. However, counsel informs the court that he is unable to appear for his client at this time. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to Jan-29-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to OCT-30-2018 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. **NOTE: The Court intends to notify the State Bar of all the Sanction Orders as required by Business and Professions Code 6086.7(a)(3) if there is no compliance and outstanding sanctions are not paid by the next hearing date.** Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
